## ⚠️ STOP

**If this is a security vulnerability, DO NOT describe it in detail in a public issue.**

Instead, email: security@pulse-app.example.com (TODO: Set up)

Include:
- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Impact assessment
- Suggested fix (if any)

## When to Use This Template

Only use this issue template for:
- Security-related questions
- Follow-up on reported vulnerabilities
- Security documentation improvements
